creator: cellestial2004@yahoo.com
text:
Libdvdcss has errors decoding keys on dvds. Dvds are over 5 years old. Tested with mplayer and xine. Was working on 6.3 RC1. Erased all ports when upgrading to 7.0 and recompiled after upgrade. Deleted dvd key directory, no effect. On disk movie files work(flv, avi).

How-To-Repeat: place dvd in drive, load xine, tap dvd button.
